records.question: Which documents with receipt number 189 and other details exactly x have a status of currently working on and a receipt date on or after 1996-07-27 03:30:40?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40' AND documents.receipt_number = '189' AND documents.other_details = 'x'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Status AS T2 ON T1.document_status_code = T2.document_status_code WHERE T1.receipt_number = '189' AND T1.other_details = 'x' AND T2.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND T1.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40'

records.question: Which documents have a receipt number exactly 55, receipt date on or before 1983-09-26 09:32:56, other details exactly p, belong to document types described as u, drafts with details exactly a, and use Fedex as the shipping agent with description k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex' AND documents.other_details = 'p' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'a' AND documents.receipt_number = '55' AND documents.receipt_date <= '1983-09-26 09:32:56'

records.question: Which documents received on or after 1996-05-31 06:51:58 have a receipt number exactly 69, other details exactly n, draft details exactly b, were mailed late, and were shipped by USPS?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE documents.receipt_date >= '1996-05-31 06:51:58' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'mailed late' AND documents.receipt_number = '69' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'b' AND documents.other_details = 'n'
records.pred_sql:

  T1.document_id
FROM Documents AS T1
INNER JOIN Document_Drafts AS T2
  ON T1.document_id = T2.document_id
INNER JOIN Documents_Mailed AS T3
  ON T1.document_id = T3.document_id
INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T4
  ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T4.shipping_agent_code
WHERE
  T1.receipt_date >= '1996-05-31 06:51:58' AND T1.receipt_number = '69' AND T1.other_details = 'n' AND T2.draft_details = 'b' AND T3.mailing_date > T1.receipt_date AND T4.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
